general-harness:mcp:Read.notes: Magenta3 uses the pi-sourced native TypeScript read tool instead of the Magenta1 process-tool magnet.

general-harness:mcp:Write.notes: Magenta3 uses the pi-sourced native TypeScript write tool instead of the Magenta1 process-tool magnet.

general-harness:mcp:Edit.notes: Magenta3 uses the pi-sourced native TypeScript edit tool instead of the Magenta1 process-tool magnet.

general-harness:mcp:Bash.notes: Magenta3 keeps bash execution in harness and injects host process operations from the assembly layer.

general-harness:mcp:Grep.notes: Magenta3 uses the native TypeScript grep tool.

general-harness:mcp:Find.notes: Magenta3 uses the native TypeScript find tool.

general-harness:mcp:Glob.notes: Magenta3's find tool accepts glob patterns, so the separate Magenta1 Glob process tool is not duplicated.

general-harness:mcp:Ls.notes: Magenta3 uses the native TypeScript ls tool.

general-harness:mcp:echo-json.notes: Magenta1 process-tool manifest migrated under harness/tools/process for Magnet smoke testing.

general-harness:mcp:ReadAnchored.notes: Hashline anchored read is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:EditHashline.notes: Hashline edit is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:FuzzyFind.notes: Fuzzy path search is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:AstGrep.notes: AST structural search is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:AstEditPlan.notes: AST edit planning remains internal but is migrated for Resolve/EditHashline flows.

general-harness:mcp:Lsp.notes: LSP-style queries are provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:WebSearch.notes: WebSearch is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:mcp:ReadUrl.notes: ReadUrl is provided by the migrated Rust process-tools binary through ProcessToolMagnet.

general-harness:declared:Read.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 read tool.

general-harness:declared:Write.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 write tool.

general-harness:declared:Edit.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 edit tool.

general-harness:declared:Bash.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 bash tool.

general-harness:declared:Grep.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 grep tool.

general-harness:declared:Find.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 find tool.

general-harness:declared:Glob.notes: The Magenta1 declared Glob metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 find tool.

general-harness:declared:Ls.notes: The Magenta1 declared metadata is covered by the registered Magenta3 ls tool.

runtime-provider:session:current.notes: Magenta3 has a TS session module with jsonl and memory storage backends.

general-harness:loop:react-loop.notes: Magenta3 uses the pi-style agent harness loop; HCP remains outside the hot path.

general-harness:system-prompt:magenta-de.notes: Magenta3 owns system prompt construction as a harness module.

general-harness:hcp-process:echo-jsonl.notes: HCP JSONL process manifest is available locally through HcpProcessMagnet, but not mounted into the default AgentSession.

runtime-provider:llm:gateway.notes: Kept as an OpenCode boundary/reference; no Magenta3 runtime implementation is registered here.

tui:pi-tui.notes: PI TUI is vendored/adapted outside harness; it is tracked here for provenance only.

tui:magenta-tui.notes: Magenta TUI and Events overlay UX are outside the harness execution catalog.
